Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose metabolism or possible prediabetes. Cholesterol and LDL are elevated, suggesting increased cardiovascular risk. HDL is also slightly above the reference range, which is generally protective. Renal function, electrolytes, and triglycerides are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation and management of dyslipidemia and glycemic control.
Provider Organization: Centre Médical et Pédagogique Jacques Arnaud
